_note: obvious phishing — CEO-fraud wire transfer, urgency + secrecy
subject: URGENT wire transfer needed now
html:
Hi John,

I'm in a meeting and need you to process a wire transfer of $48,000 to a new vendor immediately. Keep this strictly confidential. Send confirmation to my personal address once done.

Thanks

_note: subtle phishing — plausible policy update with a link to 'the portal'
subject: Updated Q3 travel policy
html:
Hi John,

We've refreshed the travel and expense policy ahead of the new quarter. Please review the changes in the portal at the HR portal when you have a moment.

Best, HR Team

_note: legit — internal meeting notes, no ask, no link
subject: Notes from today's planning meeting
html:
Hi all,

Great discussion today. Key decisions: we ship the beta in two weeks and Maria owns the rollout plan. No action needed from most of you.

Thanks!

subject: Weekly engineering digest
html:
Hi team,

This week: the search reindex finished, CI is back under 10 minutes, and the on-call rota for next month is posted in the wiki. Have a good weekend.
